title: Dog Days Are Over
why_this_song: Dog Days Are Over by Florence + the Machine (2008) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 12 times; first heard in: "The dog days are over"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "The dog days are done"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "The horses are coming"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Coming towards her, stuck still, no turning back"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "So you better run"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "days" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "days" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "done" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "done" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Coming towards her, stuck still, no turning back

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: With every bubble, she sank with her drink
By someone who should know better than that

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Dog Days Are Over" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Dog Days Are Over"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Florence + the Machine one question about "Dog Days Are Over", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Florence + the Machine sobre "Dog Days Are Over", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Dog Days Are Over" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Dog Days Are Over" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).
